reviews.comment:
Éste ACA en particular está muy  venido abajo, no entiendo porqué, dado a que tiene una buena afluencia de público. Los baños en particular dejan mucho que decear, la atención de las oficinas es con  desgano, la apariencia en general no te invita a quedarte. Espero se pongan las pilas para atraer más publico.

(Translated by Google)
This particular ACA is in a very bad state of disrepair, and I don't understand why, given that it's well-attended. The restrooms in particular leave much to be desired, the service in the offices is lackluster, and the overall appearance doesn't invite you to stay. I hope they get their act together to attract more visitors.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8171823765692458471/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRX2ZhRzhBRRAB
